rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase concerns Tax Code exemption amounts, not election scheduling. Elec. Code §41.001 governs uniform election dates and does not address tax exemptions. No direct conflict exists.
quote: Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter, each general or special election in this state shall be held on one of the following dates:
_note: No conflict. The proposed change operates in the tax-exemption domain; the rule governs election timing. If a constitutional amendment is required, it would be scheduled under existing uniform election date provisions without modification.
